inputs.label: Wine Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the wine, where 0 is flat and 10 is very tart.

inputs.label: Wine Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the wine, where 0 is bone-dry and 10 is very sweet.

inputs.label: Wine Body
inputs.businessContext: Body or weight of the wine on the palate, where 0 is light and 10 is full-bodied.

inputs.label: Food Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the food, where 0 is bland and 10 is sharply acidic.

inputs.label: Food Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the food, where 0 is savory and 10 is dessert-like.

inputs.label: Food Richness
inputs.businessContext: Richness or fattiness of the food, where 0 is lean and 10 is very heavy.

formulas.primary: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, 100 - (Math.abs(wine_acidity - food_acidity) * 8 + Math.abs(wine_sweetness - food_sweetness) * 8 + Math.abs(wine_body - food_richness) * 6)))
